title: Wasp Removal in Franklin Square | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional wasp removal services in Franklin Square, Long Island. Safe nest elimination from homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call for same-day service: $350-$550.
intro: Franklin Square homeowners and businesses face wasp infestations during warmer months, with nests appearing in eaves, attics, and outdoor structures. Best Pest Control NYC provides professional wasp removal services throughout Franklin Square, safely eliminating aggressive wasps and their nests from residential and commercial properties. Our experienced technicians respond quickly to protect your family, employees, and customers from painful stings and allergic reactions.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Franklin Square and Nassau County for years with licensed, insured technicians who specialize in safe wasp nest removal. We offer same-day emergency service, competitive pricing of $350-$550, and guaranteed results to ensure your property remains wasp-free throughout the season.
localContext: Franklin Square's mix of mid-century ranch homes, garden apartments near Franklin Avenue, and commercial properties along Hempstead Turnpike provide numerous opportunities for wasps to build nests in soffits, shutters, and landscaped areas. The tree-lined residential streets and proximity to Rath Park create ideal habitats where yellow jackets and paper wasps thrive during spring and summer months.

faqs.question: How much does wasp removal cost in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: Our wasp removal services in Franklin Square range from $350 to $550, depending on nest location, size, and accessibility. Ground nests and easily accessible areas are typically on the lower end, while second-story or concealed nests may require additional equipment and safety measures. We provide upfront pricing with no hidden fees after inspection.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day wasp removal service throughout Franklin Square when you call before noon. Most wasp nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, including treatment and nest extraction. Emergency situations involving nests near entryways or play areas receive priority scheduling to minimize danger to residents.

faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: Franklin Square properties commonly experience yellow jacket, paper wasp, and bald-faced hornet infestations. Yellow jackets often nest in wall voids and underground, paper wasps build umbrella-shaped nests under eaves and decks, and bald-faced hornets create large aerial nests in trees and shrubs. Our technicians are trained to identify and safely remove all species.

faqs.question: Is wasp removal safe for my family and pets in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and professional-grade protective equipment to ensure complete safety during wasp removal. Our technicians assess each situation to determine the safest approach, and we recommend keeping children and pets indoors during treatment. Once treatment is complete and the area is ventilated (typically 2-3 hours), your property is completely safe.
